hero_title:
Search for goods and equipment in China, Hong Kong, and Korea.
Imports to Ukraine and EU countries.
services_description: Search for goods, buyback at the factory, delivery and customs clearance
services_text:
All our customers have individual projects, so there are no universal conditions. The beginning of cooperation begins with a technical task from the buyer:
- goods/equipment/raw materials and their characteristics;
- batch size;
- desired delivery time.
delivery_air_description:
Only 14-30 days from the date of signing the contract to shipment in any city of Ukraine, subject to the availability of finished goods in the manufacturer's warehouse. If the batch needs to be manufactured, licensed, certified, the delivery time is negotiated additionally.
The cost of such delivery is always higher than sea transportation.
delivery_sea_note: The term of sea transportation is 60-90 days after signing the contract, provided that the goods are available in the manufacturer's warehouse and do not require manufacturing, licensing or certification. All details are discussed individually. The advantage of this delivery method is lower cost.
how_description: We help you find manufacturers in China and deliver goods to your order.
how_steps_0: You make a request, we look for a manufacturer.
how_steps_1: Once agreed, we buy back the goods and send them to Poland and/or Ukraine.
how_steps_2: All documentation for delivery and support of goods from the factory to your warehouse - turnkey.
about_description:
Simplify your business with our services:
We find producers, buy back goods and deliver them to Kyiv or to EU countries.
about_text:
Our group of companies is located in the following cities and countries: Zhongshan and Liujou, China; Lodz, Poland; Kyiv, Ukraine. Therefore, we have the opportunity to visit manufacturers in China, test products, and hold video conferences with manufacturers' engineers.

We have warehouses in different seaports in Poland and China, so we have every opportunity to consolidate cargo, reducing the cost of delivery.

We operate stably under martial law. In 2024, we concluded 35 agreements and completed all deliveries successfully on time.

Our clients are Ukrainian manufacturers of textile products, water purification filters, cosmetic products, electrical products, and others.

The 25 years of experience of our founders in working with various categories of goods allows us to accurately identify reliable manufacturers and ensure quality delivery.
benefits_title: The benefits of partnering with us:
benefits_items_0_title: We carry out orders with different delivery volumes
benefits_items_0_description: We have partner warehouses in Poland and China, so we consolidate cargo.
benefits_items_1_title: We provide customs cleared goods with VAT
benefits_items_1_description: You are not involved in the processes of purchasing from the factory, organizing transportation to the port in China, organizing customs clearance of goods at the port of shipment and in Ukraine.
benefits_items_2_title: Support in setting up complex equipment
benefits_items_2_description: For complex equipment or goods, we will organize support from the manufacturer's factory for you.
benefits_items_3_title: The ability to be in touch: we are accessible and open
benefits_items_3_description: Transparency at every stage: you always know what is happening with your order.
contacts_address: Our address: Kyiv, S. Bandery Ave. 21
cookies_title: We use cookies to provide the best site experience.
callback_title: Leave your phone number and we will contact you!
callback_description: By clicking the button, you consent to the processing of personal data and agree to the privacy policy
callback_success: We will contact you as soon as possible.
callback_error: Something went wrong. Please, try again, or contact us by phone.
